metadata.title: Build Assessment Wizard Shell with Multi-Step Form

story.iWant: a guided assessment wizard that clearly shows my progress through questions
story.soThat: I understand how far along I am and can complete it confidently

tasks.task: Implement step indicator showing "Question X of 10"
Add Progress bar component using shadcn/ui Progress
Implement Previous/Next navigation buttons with validation
Add Exit button with confirmation dialog
Configure React Hook Form for wizard state management
Integrate with SessionContext for session state
Use shadcn/ui Sheet component for full-screen modal
Implement ARIA landmarks and focus trap

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: AssessmentWizard renders with step indicator "Question X of 10"
Touch-friendly question area with 44px minimum tap targets
Previous button disabled on Q1, Next enabled after answer
Exit button shows confirmation before abandoning
React Hook Form manages currentStep (1-10), answers array, startTime
Form validation requires answer before advancing
Uses shadcn/ui Sheet component (full-screen on mobile)
ARIA landmarks: role="dialog", aria-labelledby="assessment-title", focus trap
Keyboard: Enter advances, Escape shows exit confirmation

doc.title: Product Requirements
doc.snippet: 10-question assessment that identifies user's math and spatial weaknesses for personalized training plan

doc.title: Architecture Spec
doc.snippet: Assessment uses features/assessment/, routes/AssessmentRoute.tsx, assessments table (Dexie), Multi-step wizard with React Hook Form

doc.title: UX Design
doc.snippet: Warm, calm visual design with streak-based habit system. Mobile-first with generous padding and 44px+ tap targets

doc.title: Epic 2 Tech Spec
doc.snippet: Multi-step form orchestration with step navigation, form submission, using SessionContext for wizard state

file.reason: Placeholder route to be replaced with wizard integration
Session state management for wizard - use startSession, endSession methods
Full-screen modal for assessment wizard shell
Progress bar component for step completion visualization
Feature module entry point - export AssessmentWizard from here
Wrap wizard in error boundary for crash recovery

constraints.constraint: 100% test coverage required for all new code
Mobile-first responsive design with 44px+ tap targets
Use React Context (SessionContext) for state management
Performance: less than 100ms input latency, 60fps interactions
Store wizard state in SessionContext during assessment

story-context.interfaces: <interface name="Progress" kind="component" signature="" path="src/shared/components/ui/progress.tsx" /> <interface name="Sheet" kind="component" signature=" void}>..." path="src/shared/components/ui/sheet.tsx" />

tests.standards: Testing follows architecture.md ADR-005: Vitest for unit/integration tests, React Testing Library for component tests, Playwright for E2E. AAA pattern (Arrange, Act, Assert). Co-located test files (*).test.tsx. 100% coverage enforced by CI. Use custom render from tests/test-utils.tsx with all providers wrapped.

ideas.idea: Test step indicator shows correct "Question X of 10" text for each step
Test progress bar value updates correctly: 10% at step 1, 100% at step 10
Test tap targets meet 44px minimum via getBoundingClientRect
Test Previous disabled on step 1, Next disabled until answer provided
Test Exit button shows confirmation dialog, confirm abandons, cancel returns
Test form state updates: currentStep increments, answers array populated
Test validation: cannot advance without answering current question
Test Sheet renders as full-screen modal
Test ARIA: role="dialog", aria-labelledby present, focus trapped in modal
Test keyboard: Enter advances when valid, Escape shows exit confirmation
